output.question: What is the current population and annual growth rate of Lagos?

sources.title: Lagos, Nigeria Metro Area Population (1950-2026) | MacroTrends
Facts About Lagos State Population In 2025 | NaijaDetails

output.findings:
As of 2025, the metropolitan area population of Lagos, Nigeria, is estimated to be approximately 17,156,000. 

The annual population growth rate for Lagos in 2025 is estimated at 3.75%. This figure represents a slight increase from the 3.7% growth rate observed in 2024, when the population was estimated at approximately 16,536,000.

metadata.label: rC
metadata.question: What is the current population and annual growth rate of Cairo?

output.question: What is the current population and annual growth rate of Cairo?
output.findings: As of 2026, the population of Cairo is estimated to be 10,119,520. The city has experienced an annual population growth of 107,125 individuals, which corresponds to an annual growth rate of 1.07%.

metadata.label: rK
metadata.question: What is the current population and annual growth rate of Kinshasa?

output.question: What is the current population and annual growth rate of Kinshasa?

sources.title: Kinshasa, Republic of Congo Metro Area Population (1950-2026)

output.findings:
As of 2026, the estimated metropolitan area population of Kinshasa is 18,553,000. This reflects a continued period of rapid urban growth.

The annual population growth rate for Kinshasa has remained consistently high in recent years. In 2026, the growth rate is estimated at 4.36%. This follows a growth rate of 4.38% in 2025 and 4.39% in 2024.

output.final_answer:
Here is the population and growth rate data for the three cities:

| City | Estimated Population | Annual Growth Rate |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Kinshasa | 18,553,000 (2026) | 4.36% |
| Lagos | 17,156,000 (2025) | 3.75% |
| Cairo | 10,119,520 (2026) | 1.07% |

Based on these figures, Kinshasa is growing the fastest at an annual rate of 4.36%.
